core.notes: Stable command descriptors, begin/end action attributes, shortcut option metadata, keyboard, mouse, and scroll shortcut resolution, configurable shortcut overrides, command hints, repeat suppression, and menu/toolbar availability synchronization are implemented. Full UDB action manager parity remains incomplete.
Compiler and nodebuilder configuration metadata is parsed. Full nodebuilder execution, script compiler execution, error parsing, and editor integration remain incomplete.

Game configuration parsing and thing catalog metadata are partial. Recent actor merge parity includes locked sprites, bright and dynamic light recalculation, blocking severity preservation, UDB stuck-inside error checks for solid actors, non-solid error-check preservation, DistanceCheck preservation for undefined CVARs, unknown preview sprite fallback, MAPINFO DoomEdNums overrides from archived unsupported actors, and explicit-category-only replacement recategorization.

Avalonia editor controls cover the main shell, menus, toolbar, status area, settings, shortcuts, recent files, error/status history, selection groups, map markers, custom fields, and basic property dialogs. Full UDB control set parity remains incomplete.

Resource list serialization, WAD, PK3, nested PK3, directory, mixed priority stack, palette, colormap, sprite, texture, flat, hires, voxel, and model discovery behavior have focused coverage. Full UDB DataManager parity remains incomplete.
Patch data model, thing parsing, frame parsing, sprite replacements, parser behavior, and thing catalog merge support exist. Full UDB baseline DehackedData table processing remains incomplete.

Selection conversion, duplicate, copy helpers, stitching, merge geometry mode, tag helpers, named flags, custom fields, and several edit-mode surfaces are covered. Full UDB editing mode parity remains incomplete.

Editor startup, window placement, dirty-state prompts, reload, close, autosave recovery, recent files and maps, status history, error logs, update-check replacement, file conflict checks, and before/after command launch plans are covered. Full UDB application orchestration remains incomplete.

Focused parity exists for point-in-polygon, linedef measurement, nearest vertex, linedef and thing queries, snapping, map-wide range wrappers, blockmap traversal, and selected geometry stitching helpers. Full trace paths, curve tools, triangulation, frustum behavior, label placement, and validation remain incomplete.
The editor shell exposes 2D and 3D mode entry points, toolbar/menu wiring, shortcuts, and visual-mode scaffolding. Full GZBuilder visual editing behavior remains incomplete.

Doom, Hexen, and UDMF map loading and writing have focused compatibility coverage, including invalid element filtering, unsigned binary fields, UDMF block and field order, custom fields, stream facades, map conversion, and PK3/WAD resource IO. Full universal IO parity remains incomplete.

Map model coverage includes element collections, map options, selection groups, marks, tags, argument handling, property copying, clone and clipboard snapshots, binary format cleanup, blockmap population, and several geometry mutation helpers. Full UDB MapSet behavior remains incomplete.
Basic thing, linedef, sector, sidedef, UDMF flag, custom field, map marker, map options, and namespace dialogs are present. Full UDB property panel and field editor parity remains incomplete.

2D map rendering, grid display, textured previews, sprite and thing previews, camera texture image handling, dynamic bitmap images, unknown images, voxel image discovery, and large-map 3D performance guards have coverage. Full UDB renderer and visual mode rendering parity remains incomplete.

WAD, PK3, nested PK3, directory, mixed stack, texture, flat, patch, sprite, hires, voxel, model, camera texture, dynamic bitmap, unknown image, and cache invalidation behavior have focused coverage. Full lazy loading, advanced namespace behavior, and UDB DataManager parity remain incomplete.

Game configuration types, thing metadata, argument render metadata, map format flags, texture definitions, and ZDoom data structures are partially modeled. Full UDB type system parity remains incomplete.
Mode switching, 3D entry, selected geometry editing surfaces, command shortcuts, status hints, and rendering scaffolding exist. Full UDB visual mode tools and interaction behavior remain incomplete.

Main window, dialogs for open map, settings, shortcuts, status history, errors, autosave recovery, selection groups, custom fields, map markers, and map options are present. Full UDB window and docking system parity remains incomplete.

DECORATE and ZScript parsers cover many actor metadata, state preview, goto, user variable, region, DoomEdNum, DamageType, DECORATE include validation, DECORATE state cast validation, DECORATE user-variable validation, ZScript preprocessor validation, and actor merge behaviors, including MAPINFO DoomEdNums overrides from archived unsupported actors. TEXTURES, MODELDEF, SNDINFO, SNDSEQ, TERRAIN, LOCKDEFS, DECALDEF, VOXELDEF, IWADINFO, CVARINFO, REVERBS, X11 RGB, MAPINFO, ZMAPINFO, and GLDEFS all have focused parser coverage. TEXTURES includes default-scale composition metadata, UDB-style Graphic skipping, UDB-style unknown declaration consumption, and namespace-specific duplicate handling. GLDEFS covers lights, objects, glow metadata, skyboxes, includes, invalid declaration abort behavior, and unknown structure handling. Full actor semantics, model rendering, voxel rendering, and broader ZDoom data integration remain incomplete.
